schemaIntro: Every LBTA lesson follows the 4-block schema. Blocks are non-negotiable; minute splits adjust by age and length. The schema maps to the Movement · Craft · Community pillar.

blocks.label: Movement Warm-up
blocks.purpose: Dynamic warm-up + footwork — connects Fit4Tennis principles

blocks.label: Craft Block
blocks.purpose: One technical or tactical focus — drilled to mastery

warmupLibrary.universalOpener: 3-line dynamic mobility (high-knees, lateral skips, carioca) + 4-corner footwork ladder.

strokeFundamentals.subFoci: grip → unit turn → racket lag → contact → recovery
split-step timing → block return → swing return
grip → punch vs slice → split-step before contact

tactical.title: Tactical patterns (mix in throughout)
items: Approach and volley off the short ball

liveBallFormats.name: Set-up sets
liveBallFormats.description: Score 30-30, deuce, ad — start there to compress rep count.

liveBallFormats.name: Pattern point play
liveBallFormats.description: Point must include the day's pattern; coach scores extra.

reviewTemplates.title: 60-second debrief
reviewTemplates.body: What worked? What's the cue you take home?

reviewTemplates.title: Homework assignment
reviewTemplates.body: One assigned homework drill — logged into RacquetIQ practice planner.

reviewTemplates.title: Parent recap (one line)
reviewTemplates.body: Texted via GHL automation after the session.

variants.note: Minute splits adjust to court ratio (1:6 ratio max for Yellow+).
Block 2 doubles to 40 min; Block 3 → 1:1 patterns.
90-min default, adds tactical block + a daily drill from Fit4Tennis.
